# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest version of this project is actively supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | Yes                |
| < 1.0.0 | No                 |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you discover a security vulnerability within this project, please do not open a public issue. Instead, report it privately by sending an email to the repository owner or security team contact listed in this repository. 

We will investigate all reports and attempt to patch the issue as quickly as possible.
